suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a required in-session fallback when `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` fan-out fails: review each completed feature directly from the worker transcript skeleton, handoff, and commit diff; author the per-feature review JSONs manually; and continue to synthesis instead of depending on the broken subagent path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This milestone attempted parallel `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches for all four completed implementation features, and every launch failed with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high`. Scrutiny still completed by manually reviewing the four feature transcript skeletons, handoffs, and commit diffs and writing `.factory/validation/tenant-admin-auth-boundaries/scrutiny/reviews/*.json` directly.
